headline: The Nasdaq-100 Is Getting 5 New Members. Here's the List.
summary: AI stocks are growing in size, and that's reflected in the June 2026 Nasdaq-100 rebalance.

headline: Teradyne (TER) Moves 7.2% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: Teradyne (TER) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
